1.title: Display Integrity Overview and Integrity Summary Tabs

content.text: System shall display two tabs: Integrity Overview and Integrity Summary on the Integrity test screen.
see two tabs for Integrity Overview and Integrity Summary
I can navigate between different integrity test insights.
the Integrity Test screen is displayed
the system displays two tabs labelled “Integrity Overview” and “Integrity Summary.”
System shall allow users to switch between Integrity Overview and Integrity Summary tabs.
switch between Integrity Overview and Integrity Summary tabs
I can access different integrity analytics views.
the Integrity Test tabs are displayed
the user clicks either Integrity Overview or Integrity Summary
the system switches the view to the selected tab.
System shall display the Integrity Summary tab content when the user selects the Integrity Summary tab.
see the Integrity Summary content when selecting the tab
I can review detailed test records.
the Integrity Test screen is displayed
the user selects the Integrity Summary tab
the system displays the Integrity Summary content.
System shall display a date range selector to filter integrity test data.
a date range selector to filter integrity test data
I can analyze tests within specific time periods.
the Integrity Summary tab is displayed
the system displays a date range selector.
System shall allow users to select predefined date ranges such as Last 6 Months, last 7 days etc.
I can quickly filter integrity test records.
the date range selector is opened
the system allows selection of predefined ranges such as Last 6 Months, Last 7 Days, etc.

6.title: Update Summary Table Based on Date Range

content.text: System shall update the Integrity Summary table based on the selected date range.
the Integrity Summary table to update based on the selected date range
I can see test records relevant to the selected period.
the system updates the Integrity Summary table data accordingly.

7.title: Display Tabular List of Executed Integrity Tests

content.text: System shall display a tabular list of integrity tests executed within the selected time range.
view executed integrity tests in a table
I can review detailed test records.
the Integrity Summary tab is active
the system displays a tabular list of integrity tests executed within the selected time range.

8.title: Display Table Columns for Integrity Tests

content.text: System shall display the following columns in the table: Test ID, Test Name, Impact Level, Element, Location, Test Result, Severity, and Deviation %.
see structured columns in the table
test information is organized and easy to read.
the Integrity Summary table is displayed
Test ID, Test Name, Impact Level, Element, Location, Test Result, Severity, and Deviation %.
System shall display the Test ID as a unique identifier for each integrity test record. (e.g. L1-001)
see a unique identifier for each integrity test
I can easily reference specific test records.
the Integrity Summary table is displayed
the system displays a unique Test ID (e.g., L1-001) for each record.
System shall display the Test Name column indicating the type of structural integrity test performed.
I know which structural integrity test was performed.
the Integrity Summary table is displayed
the system displays the Test Name column indicating the type of integrity test performed.
System shall display the Impact Level for the test such as Local or Global.
I know whether the test affects a local component or the entire system.
the system displays the Impact Level (e.g., Local or Global).
System shall display the Element column indicating the rack component tested (e.g., Beam, Upright, Baseplate, Anchor, Decking).
see which rack component was tested
I can identify the affected structural element.
the Integrity Summary table is displayed
the system displays the Element column showing components such as Beam, Upright, Baseplate, Anchor, or Decking.
System shall display the Location column indicating the rack location details such as Rack ID, Bay, Level, and Position.
the rack location displayed for each test
I know where the test was performed.
the system displays the Location column showing Rack ID, Bay, Level, and Position.
System shall display the Test Result indicating the evaluation outcome (e.g. Acceptable, Not Acceptable etc.)
see the evaluation result of the test
the Integrity Summary table is displayed
the system displays the Test Result column with values such as Acceptable, Not Acceptable, or Borderline.
System shall display the Severity column indicating severity classification such as Green, Amber, or Red.
see the severity classification for each test
the Integrity Summary table is displayed
the system displays the Severity column with values such as Green, Amber, or Red.
System shall display severity indicators using color-coded labels.
severity indicators displayed using color-coded labels
severity levels are easy to interpret visually.
the system displays color-coded severity labels.

17.title: Display Green Labels for Acceptable Results

content.text: System shall display Green labels for acceptable results.
acceptable test results marked in green
I can quickly identify compliant conditions.
the system displays a Green severity label.

18.title: Display Amber Labels for Borderline Results

content.text: System shall display Amber labels for borderline conditions.
borderline test results marked in amber
I can identify moderate risk conditions.
the system displays an Amber severity label.

19.title: Display Red Labels for Failed Results

content.text: System shall display Red labels for unacceptable or failed test results.
failed test results marked in red
a test result is unacceptable or failed
the system displays a Red severity label.
System shall visually distinguish higher deviation values using colour emphasis where applicable.
the system applies visual colour emphasis to highlight higher deviation values.
System shall allow users to scroll vertically through the table when the number of records exceeds the visible area.
scroll through the table when many records exist
I can access all test records.
the number of records exceeds the visible table area
the system enables vertical scrolling within the table.

22.title: Maintain Column Header Visibility During Scroll

content.text: System shall maintain column header visibility while scrolling through the table records.
table headers to remain visible while scrolling
I can understand the column context for each record.
the Integrity Summary table contains multiple records
the user scrolls vertically through the table
the system keeps the column headers fixed and visible.

23.title: Refresh Table Data on Filter or Date Change

content.text: System shall dynamically refresh table data when filters or date range selections are updated.
the table data to refresh when filters or date range change
the table reflects the latest filtered dataset.
filters or date range selectors are available
the user modifies any filter or date range
the system dynamically refreshes the Integrity Summary table data.
System shall display a Filters side panel when the user clicks the Filters option on the Integrity Summary page.
a Filters side panel to appear when selecting the Filters option
I can refine integrity test results using multiple filters.
the Integrity Summary page is displayed
the user clicks the Filters option
the system displays a Filters side panel.
System shall display the panel title “Filters” at the top of the panel.
the Filters panel to display a clear title
I understand the purpose of the panel.
the system shall display “Filters” title at the top
System shall display helper text indicating that multiple filters can be applied to refine test results.
I understand that multiple filters can be applied.
the system displays helper text indicating multiple filters can be applied to refine test results.
System shall allow users to close the filters panel using the Close (X) icon.
close the Filters panel using a close icon
I can return to the main page view.
the user clicks the Close (X) icon
the system closes the Filters panel.

28.title: Display Filters Panel as Right-Side Drawer

content.text: System shall display the filters panel as a right-side overlay drawer above the page content.
the Filters panel to appear as a right-side overlay drawer
I can apply filters without leaving the page context.
the system displays it as a right-side overlay drawer above the page content.
System shall display a Risk Status filter section within the filters panel.
I can filter integrity tests by severity status.
the system displays a Risk Status filter section.
System shall display selectable Risk Status options including Green, Amber, Red, and Critical.
I can filter test results by severity.
the Risk Status filter section is displayed
the system displays Green, Amber, Red, and Critical as selectable options.
System shall allow users to select one or more Risk status options simultaneously.
I can filter results across several severity levels.
the Risk Status filter options are displayed
the user selects more than one option
the system allows multiple selections simultaneously.
System shall visually highlight the selected risk status option.
selected risk status options visually highlighted
I can clearly see which filters are active.
the user selects a risk status option
the system visually highlights the selected option.
System shall filter test records based on the selected Risk status values when filters are applied.
the table to filter results based on selected risk statuses
I can analyze tests matching the selected severity.
one or more risk status options are selected
the system filters the test records accordingly.
System shall display a Scope filter section.
I can filter tests based on their impact scope.
the system displays a Scope filter section.
System shall display scope options including Global and Local.
I can filter tests by Global or Local scope.
the Scope filter section is displayed
the system displays Global and Local scope options.
System shall allow users to select one or more scope options using checkboxes.
I can filter results across both local and global tests.
the Scope filter options are displayed
the system allows multi-selection using checkboxes.
System shall filter test results based on the selected scope values when filters are applied.
the table to filter results based on selected scope values
I can view tests matching the chosen scope.
the system filters the test results accordingly.
System shall display an Acceptability filter section.
I can filter results based on evaluation outcomes.
the system displays an Acceptability filter section.
System shall display acceptability options including Acceptable, Borderline, and Not Acceptable.
the Acceptability filter section is displayed
the system displays Acceptable, Borderline, and Not Acceptable options.
System shall allow users to select one or more acceptability options using checkboxes.
I can filter tests with different evaluation outcomes.
the Acceptability filter options are displayed
the system allows selection of one or more acceptability options
System shall filter integrity test results based on the selected acceptability criteria.
integrity test results filtered by selected acceptability criteria
I can view tests with specific evaluation outcomes.
one or more acceptability options are selected
the system filters integrity test records based on the selected acceptability criteria.
System shall display an Element Type filter section.
I can filter integrity tests by rack component.
the system displays an Element Type filter section.
System shall display element options including Anchor, Baseplate, Beam, Decking, and Upright.
I can select the components relevant to my analysis.
the Element Type filter section is displayed
the system displays element types including Anchor, Baseplate, Beam, Decking, and Upright.
System shall allow users to select multiple element types using checkboxes.
I can filter results across different rack components.
the Element Type options are displayed
the system allows multiple element types to be selected simultaneously.
System shall filter integrity test records based on the selected element types.
integrity test records filtered by selected element types
I can analyze tests related to specific rack components.
one or more element types are selected
the system filters the integrity test records based on the selected element types.
System shall display an “Apply Filters” button at the bottom of the filters panel.
an Apply Filters button in the filters panel
I can apply selected filters to the results.
the system displays an “Apply Filters” button at the bottom of the panel.
System shall apply all selected filters to the Integrity Summary results when the Apply Filters button is clicked.
the system to apply all selected filters
the results reflect the refined dataset.
the user clicks the Apply Filters button
the system applies all selected filters to the Integrity Summary results.
System shall display a “Clear All” option to reset all selected filters.
I can reset all applied filters quickly.
the system displays a “Clear All” option.
System shall remove all selected filter values when the Clear All option is selected.
all filters cleared when selecting Clear All
I can return to the default dataset view.
one or more filters are selected
the system removes all selected filter values.
System shall refresh the Integrity Summary results table after filters are applied or cleared.
the table to refresh after filters are applied or cleared
the displayed results reflect the current filter state.
the system refreshes the Integrity Summary results table.
System shall allow users to scroll within the filters panel when the filter list exceeds the visible panel height.
I can access all filter options even when they exceed the visible area.
the filters panel contains more options than the visible height
the user navigates within the panel
the system allows vertical scrolling inside the filters panel.
System shall maintain the Apply Filters and Clear All actions accessible at the bottom of the panel.
the Apply Filters and Clear All actions always accessible
I can easily apply or reset filters.
the filters panel contains scrollable content
the user scrolls through filter options
the system keeps the Apply Filters and Clear All actions accessible at the bottom of the panel.

53.title: Dynamically Update Results Based on Filters

content.text: System shall dynamically update the result set to reflect the currently applied filters.
the results to reflect applied filters
I can view only relevant integrity test records.
the system displays only the records matching the currently applied filters.
System shall display the Test Details page when the user selects a specific test record from the Integrity Summary table.
open the Test Details page by selecting a test record
I can view complete information about a specific test.
the Integrity Summary table is displayed
the user clicks a specific test record
the system navigates to the Test Details page.
System shall display breadcrumb navigation showing Rack → Integrated Rack Diagnostic Suite → Integrity Test → Test ID.
I can understand the navigation hierarchy.
the Test Details page is opened
Rack → Integrated Rack Diagnostic Suite → Integrity Test → Test ID.

56.title: Display Test ID as Page Title

content.text: System shall display the selected Test ID as the page title.
the Test ID displayed as the page title
I can easily identify the selected test.
the Test Details page is displayed
the system displays the selected Test ID as the page title.
System shall display two tabs: Testing and Observation.
Testing and Observation tabs on the Test Details page
I can switch between test data and related observations.
the Test Details page is displayed
the system displays two tabs labelled “Testing” and “Observation.”
System shall display Testing tab content by default when the page loads.
the Testing tab displayed by default
I immediately see the test evaluation information.
the Test Details page is opened
the system displays the Testing tab content by default.

59.title: Switch Between Testing and Observation Tabs

content.text: System shall allow users to switch between Testing and Observation tabs.
switch between Testing and Observation tabs
I can access both test details and observation records.
the Testing and Observation tabs are displayed
the system switches to display the corresponding tab content.
System shall display a Location Details section containing rack location information.
I can understand where the test was conducted.
the system displays a Location Details section containing rack location information.
System shall display the Rack Name, Bay number, element being tested (e.g., Upright)
see rack name, bay number, and tested element
I can identify the test location and component.
the Location Details section is displayed
the system displays Rack Name, Bay Number, and the element being tested (e.g., Upright).
System shall display the Full Location Path including Rack, Bay, Level, and Position.
I can identify the exact test position.
the Location Details section is displayed
the system displays the Full Location Path including Rack, Bay, Level, and Position.
System shall display the Scope of the test (e.g., Local or Global).
the scope of the test displayed
I know whether the test affects a local component or the entire system.
the Location Details section is displayed
the system displays the Scope of the test (e.g., Local or Global).
System shall display a Test Information section.
I can view the details of the integrity test performed.
the system displays a Test Information section.

65.title: Display Test Name, Code, and Input Method

content.text: System shall display the Test Name (e.g., Local Bend Test), Test Code (e.g., L1), and the Test Method (used to capture the test measurement) in the Test information section.
see the test name, test code, and input method
I understand how the test measurement was captured.
the Test Information section is displayed
the system displays Test Name (e.g., Local Bend Test), Test Code (e.g., L1), and Input Method used to capture the measurement.
System shall display a Test Evaluation Summary section.
I can review the results of the integrity test.
the system displays a Test Evaluation Summary section.
System shall display the Overall Result of the test (e.g., Fail).
I can determine whether the test passed or failed.
the Test Evaluation Summary section is displayed
the system displays the Overall Result of the test (e.g., Fail).
System shall display the Overall Acceptability status (e.g., Not Acceptable).
I understand whether the test meets the required standards.
the Test Evaluation Summary section is displayed
the system displays the Overall Acceptability status (e.g., Not Acceptable).
System shall display the Governing Direction of the measurement (e.g., Cross-Aisle).
see the governing direction of the measurement
I know which structural direction influenced the result.
the Test Evaluation Summary section is displayed
the system displays the Governing Direction (e.g., Cross-Aisle).
System shall display the Maximum Measured Deflection value in millimetres.
see the maximum measured deflection value
I can understand the extent of deviation detected.
the Test Evaluation Summary section is displayed
the system displays the Maximum Measured Deflection value in millimetres.
System shall highlight critical measurement values such as deflection using visual emphasis (e.g., red text).
I can quickly identify abnormal measurements.
measurement results are displayed in the Test Evaluation Summary
the system highlights the value using visual emphasis (e.g., red text).
System shall display a Test Notes section containing inspector observations.
I can read inspector observations about the test.
the Test Details page is displayed
the system displays a Test Notes section containing inspector observations.
System shall display notes describing observed structural issues or deviations.
notes describing structural issues or deviations
I can understand the inspector’s findings.
the Test Notes section is displayed
the system displays descriptive notes about structural issues or deviations.
System shall display an Execution Metadata section.
I can view information about test execution.
the Test Details page is displayed
the system displays an Execution Metadata section.
System shall display the name of the inspector who executed the test. (Executed By)
I know who performed the test.
the Execution Metadata section is displayed
the system displays the name of the inspector who executed the test.

76.title: Display Test Execution Date and Time

content.text: System shall display the Execution date and time of the test.
the execution date and time displayed
I know when the test was conducted.
the Execution Metadata section is displayed
the system displays the execution date and time of the test.
System shall display a Media Evidence section on the right panel.
a Media Evidence section on the right panel
I can review visual or audio evidence associated with the test.
the Test Details page is displayed
the system displays a Media Evidence section on the right panel.
System shall display uploaded images associated with the test.
images related to the test displayed
I can visually verify structural conditions.
the system displays uploaded images associated with the test.
System shall display video evidence related to the test.
I can review recorded test conditions.
the system displays video evidence related to the test.
System shall allow users to play video recordings within the media viewer.
I can observe inspection details captured during testing.
the system plays the video within the media viewer.
System shall display audio recordings associated with the inspection.
I can listen to recorded inspection notes.
the system displays audio recordings associated with the inspection.
System shall allow users to play audio recordings within the interface.
I can hear recorded inspector observations.
the user selects an audio file
the system plays the audio recording within the interface.
System shall allow users to download audio recordings.
I can store or share inspection evidence.
the user selects the download option
the system downloads the audio recording file.
System shall display a Reference Technical Diagram illustrating the test measurement methodology.
I understand the measurement methodology used for the test.
the Test Details page is displayed
the system displays a Reference Technical Diagram illustrating the measurement methodology.
System shall display labels within the diagram indicating measurement points and deflection values.
measurement points labeled in the diagram
I can clearly understand measurement references.
the system displays labels indicating measurement points and deflection values.
System shall display a “View Full Drawing” option to open the diagram in an expanded view.
an option to view the diagram in full size
I can examine technical details clearly.
the system opens the diagram in an expanded view.
System shall display a Reference Diagram modal when the user selects “View Full Drawing”.
the full diagram displayed in a modal
I can focus on the technical illustration.
the system displays a Reference Diagram modal.

88.title: Display Diagram Title with Test Code

content.text: System shall display the diagram title including the test code (e.g., Reference Diagram: L1).
the modal title to include the test code
I know which test the diagram refers to.
the Reference Diagram modal is displayed
the system displays the diagram title including the test code (e.g., Reference Diagram: L1).
System shall display descriptive text explaining the measurement methodology and Reference for the test.
explanatory text about the measurement methodology
I can understand how the measurement is performed.
the Reference Diagram modal is displayed
the system displays descriptive text explaining the measurement methodology.
System shall display the full-size technical diagram illustrating the measurement technique.
the technical diagram displayed in full size
I can clearly view measurement techniques.
the Reference Diagram modal is open
the system displays the full-size technical diagram illustrating the measurement technique.
System shall allow users to close the modal using the Close (X) icon.
I can return to the Test Details page.
the Reference Diagram modal is open
the user clicks the Close (X) icon
System shall display the modal centred on the screen with the background dimmed.
the modal displayed centrally with a dimmed background
the focus remains on the diagram.
the Reference Diagram modal is displayed
the system centers the modal and dims the background content.

93.title: Enable Vertical Scrolling on Test Details Page

content.text: System shall allow users to scroll vertically through the Test Details page when content exceeds the viewport height.
scroll through the Test Details page
I can view all sections when content exceeds the screen height.
page content exceeds the viewport height
System shall maintain consistent layout separation between content sections.
the layout remains structured and readable.
the Test Details page is displayed
the system maintains consistent spacing and separation between content sections.
System shall dynamically display test-specific information based on the selected test record.
the page to display information specific to the selected test
the details correspond to the chosen test record.
a specific test record is selected
the system dynamically displays test-specific information related to that record.
